How's it going team? In this video I wanted to talk to you about the 42-day detox membership click funnel. We're going to go over what the setup process entails and what you need to have prepared beforehand. So the first thing I recommend is to get and use the tracking document and we'll cover that in just a moment but it's a document you can use to track all the links and codes you'll use as part of this membership funnel setup. We're going to cover what you need done before the setup and then I'm going to give you a brief review of what's going to be involved in setting up this membership funnel. Now you need to get and use the tracking doc that we provided for the 42-day detox setup that way you have everything in one place. You may already have this if you set up the cold traffic funnel so if you do you can just use that same document you don't have to get a new one. If you didn't do the cold traffic setup and got the document used it click the button below this video to get a copy. It's going to take you to a page that says copy document go and hit that blue make a copy button and it should give you a document of your very own on your own Google Drive just like this. So what you need before the setup you need to set up your click funnels and acuity accounts so if you haven't already set up your click funnels account and your acuity account and you probably need to pay the acuity account for this because you have to make multiple calendars you want to go and get those set up now we have videos for that in the tech course and we'll link below them as well. You also will need to record videos for the membership click funnel. Now videos for the membership click funnel are going to be seven to eight different videos. You're going to upload them to YouTube as private videos that means that you're able to see them if you give somebody the link like we're going to use in this situation but they aren't able to see it on your channel that way your channel is not cluttered up with a lot of these videos and then you want to place those YouTube links on the tracking doc and we give you different fields for those. So as far as videos for the membership click funnel that you actually need you'll need a welcome video on the login page and this is a video on the login page greeting them. You can do two different videos for this if you want one for people doing the challenge at home or one for people doing the challenge in the gym or you can try to make one video and just have a generic enough that it doesn't really overlap. You'll need to do a weekly weigh-in and how video and this is going to be two different videos one for those doing the challenge at home one for those doing it in the gym. You're going to need a gyms favorite subs video and this is your recommended supplement and you want to try to align this video with your sales strategy so if you're selling ultimate bundles you may want to recommend that or if you're focusing on specific products you can recommend those products here too. You need to do a what-to-expect-on-way-out-day video and you're going to have to do one of these for in the gym one of these for people who are doing at home that way you have different way-up processes and everybody's prepared for it and then what if I'm not getting results so this is going to be a video covering that they're staying accountable that they're drinking water staying on the meal plan working out etc. And now the setup process for the actual membership funnels we're going to have a few different steps the first one is to create the Q&A calendars and appointments we're going to show you how to import the membership click funnel to your click funnels account we're going to show you how to update the funnel name domain and paths we're going to show you what to customize in the funnel itself how to make a copy of that funnel and that's cloning it and then what to change in the clone and we'll walk you through step by step this entire process now if you need tech support for any of this use enter com that's a blue icon at the bottom right hand corner of the portal whenever you click on that I'll give you a chat agent right away they're able to start talking with you and give you help and support let's start with creating the Qt calendar and appointments that you'll need for this membership click funnel now for the 42g ad talks membership click funnel a Qt calendar and appointments we recommend at least two calendars and two appointment types that's going to give you one calendar and appointment type for the midway check-in and one calendar and appointment type for the way out calendar scheduling determines available appointment times so whatever schedule you set is available on the calendar level is going to restrict it to when they can schedule those appointments on their side the clients optionally you can create separate calendars for the gym appointments people doing the challenge at the gym and people doing the challenge at home and that can end up resulting into four calendars and four appointment types again that's optional you don't have to worry about that now this is all in addition to whatever you may have set up for your cold traffic funnel if you're doing cold traffic as well this is just for the membership portion so this is my tracking document that I already have and I'm at this membership click funnel section as you can see I've already made the YouTube videos and I've put in the links there for the YouTube videos I'm ready to get started on the security right now so once you have this document open go and open up a new tab we want to go to a Qt scheduling.com login if you need to it's going to take you to the domain page and on the left hand side let's go and click on business settings once we're in business settings we want to click this green add new calendar button we want to give this a good calendar name so this is going to be Qt day, DT, Fox, Midway if you want to receive notifications to an email address other than the one you signed into a Qt with so maybe your personal one of your trainers or coaches you can put in their email address here you can also put in phone numbers to get a text message I do recommend choosing a good picture for this you can either choose your gym logo or picture specific for the 42-day detox location if you don't have a location selected you can always add a new one or leave it at none let's save location to save it now it's in that drop-down time zone you shouldn't need to change that set at the account level now here where it says allow appointments to be scheduled at a time slot this is where you can allow either one appointment at a time one person at a time or allow double booking where you can do two three however many you want so by default it's going to only let one person schedule one time block you want to change up to a different number you can go ahead and change that so if I change it to four and now allows double booking you want to go and change it back to one but you can change it to whatever you're comfortable with and then under accept you normally want to put it appointments until fully booked so we've given our good calendar name this one is visible to our clients and make sure it's something you're comfortable with them saying email and phone number for notifications that's optional and your clients cannot see that the picture you want to choose either your gym logo or a picture that you have for the 42-day detox location you can leave that at none or you can go and add a new location put that there it is going to be displayed to the clients as well so make sure you're okay with that you don't need to do anything with time zone you want to adjust how many appointments can be scheduled at a time slot and then accept appointments until fully booked once that looks good let's go ahead this green create calendar button it's going to take us to where we can set the days that they're able to schedule appointments on the time blocks on those days by default it's going to do regular weekly hours meaning it's going to repeat every single week it's going to copy these over and over and over again when we look at this you see this repeated over and over you probably don't want to do this but you can if you want to if you're going to continuously do these normally you want to schedule this at a reasonable time so let's go and uncheck regular weekly hours and click this button that says save switch to specific days so now it says we've saved the availability and now we're able to set it to just specific days so this is going to be three weeks after your initial appointments so say you did all of your way ends on the first and second you want to count out three weeks three and this is when you want to do your midway check-in and go ahead and put whatever times you're available and do a return and do different time blocks and then hit the screen set hours button so now they're all able to schedule it only on those certain time frames it's going to add in one for Sunday too it's going to make that a little more specific so you can add in 30 or 15 however you want to set it then hit that green set hours button so now when they go to schedule they're going to see that on there whenever you run this play make sure you're coming back to this calendar and adding in those days that way they're able to see what appointments are available for their time so now that we have our days set up let's go and make our way out calendar so on the left hand side where it says availability and calendars we're going to click that then click the green add new calendar button we're going to repeat the same process so okay detox right out and notification email address so that way make sure when people get text messages when people sign up go and choose either a picture of our gym or one for the 42-day detox I'm going to go and set at a time and then we can go ahead and accept appointments until fully booked that looks great so let's go and hit this green create calendar button we want to click this check mark next to this calendar has regular hours every week to clear that out then click save switch to specific days so we want to go ahead and schedule this is six weeks out so if three weeks was that week so that's first that's one week two three four five six and set that for whatever hours you're going to be available hit that green set hours button I'll save it if you noticed I didn't hit that save hours set left hand side let's go ahead and hit appointment types it's good and do new type of service let's set green button at the top set the duration for however long you want that appointment to be if you aren't going to spend a lot of time on the midway you can do shorter times if you want to set it up to where you get a buffer zone on your appointment so that way they aren't back to back to back you can click this block off extra time before after and put in however many minutes you want to put in there that way you don't continuously have appointments pricing category you probably don't need to do anything what picture you don't need to change out it's going to use the one from the calendar by default but you can put a different one in here if you want access needs to be public that means I'm going to go and paste that link. That way we can use it in our click funnel later on. Then head back to our tracking dock again. We're way out. So I chose way out there. Way out. Now we're going to go and import the membership click funnel. So this is going to be where you import the version that we have that we provide as a template into your own ClickFunnels account. Look below this video and you're going to see a button. When you click on that button it's going to start the import process for your membership click funnel. I'm going to open a new tab and I'm not signed into ClickFunnels so if you see this you do need to log in. Go click member login at the top right. Enter in your email address and password and click on login. I'm going to take us to this shared funnels being process page and there's our new funnel. It's making a copy of it to your account so it may take a little bit of time. It shows us the screen progress bar to last know once it's done. Once the screen progress bar makes it all the way to the right it's going to change over and say complete view funnel. There we go. So we're going to click on view funnel and it's going to take us to our new funnel and this is now in your account. The first thing we want to do is change the name so on this page at the top right click on the settings and go ahead and name the funnel whatever you want to. I'm going to call it 42-day detox challenge and then put a gym name. Yours can be whatever you want. There's no right answer. Go ahead and scroll down once you get that name in there and click this green save and update settings button and you can see at the top left it's changed that name. That's exactly what we want to see. Let's go ahead and update this funnel step settings here so right underneath membership access right next to this URL there's this gear icon says funnel step setting. Click on that and let's change this path. The path can be letters, numbers, dashes or underscores. You can't use a space so you can do something like 42-day detox or any variation that you want to use. Just make sure you don't use any space. Let's also highlight this and copy it to our clipboard. I'm hitting control C on a Windows computer or command C on a Mac. That's going to copy that to your clipboard. Let's go ahead and hit update funnel step, that green button. It'll take us back here. Right underneath this preview page says 42-day detox. We want to click on this gear icon that says edits page split test settings right there. I'm going to open this up and it's going to ask for the path. This should match exactly what you just changed before. If it looks great, go ahead and hit that green update page button. Now let's select this URL, this link. So I highlighted all. I'm going to copy it to my clipboard with that control C or that command C. lesson one, as I mentioned before sometimes you can end up with extras whenever you import a funnel or clone it, so I'm going to go and delete that first section first lesson, make sure I'm choosing the right one, you don't want to accidentally delete a lesson, you can't undo it, it's going to hit okay scroll down, and we end up with two here, so I'm going to go and delete it now when I look at the very bottom, we don't have any extra lessons that are blank there, so there we go, we've customized both of our click funnels, our click funnel for doing it at the gym, and our membership click funnel for people who are doing it at home, now I want to show you how to create and manage memberships for these click funnels, these are going to be the usernames and passwords that your clients are going to use to log in, make sure that anybody who's in the at home, you choose the at home registration link, anybody who's doing it in-gym you choose the in-gym because of course those videos differ, the first thing you want to do is make sure you have this document that you're tracking all your links open, you want to make sure you have your links for your 42-day detox, the ones who actually have membership to your gym, and the ones who are doing the at home challenge, and make sure you have those links filled in, if you don't have it go ahead and head to the video about importing click funnels that's part of this play and it's going to cover filling those in for you, go ahead and open a new tab and we want to go to clickfunnels.com and hit enter, now we're not logged in, this is what we wanted to see, if you are logged in you want to log out, and let me show you how to log out of click funnels, so inside of click funnels at the top right move your mouse over the portrait and click on sign out, that's because if you're signed into it and you're the one who owns the funnels then it's not going to take you to the registration page, it's just going to take you right to the actual content of the funnel, it's going to make it where you can't do this create account creation process, you can go and close out that tab once you've made sure you are not signed into click funnels, and let's go and choose one of these registration URLs, so say you're creating a membership for somebody who does have a membership to your gym, but you still want them to have access to all this great information, go ahead and choose your 42-day detox registration URL, you'll highlight it all and copy it, open a new tab and in the address bar at the top left go and paste it, it's going to take you right here to this registration screen, let's go and make an account, so fake, and make sure you get the right email address from them, if you get the right email address there's a reset password link that they can use to reset their own password, that way you don't have to worry about that, so always make sure you get a good email address that they're able to access, go and choose a good password for them, it doesn't have to be too complicated but it's better to have a secure password than a not secure one, once you go and get that password in there and you do have to type it in twice, they do have to match, hit the create your account button, and at that point it's going to take them right here, you want to go and provide them the email address and password that you used, so that way they're able to access this portal on their own, let's go ahead and close out of this, and I'm going to show you how to remove somebody from the click funnel, so go ahead and open a new tab and let's go back to click funnels, if you weren't signed in go ahead and sign in, you want to look for click funnels up at the top right and click on funnels, and this is going to show all of the funnels on your account, you're going to see a bunch here, don't worry about that, these are just some of our testing funnels, that's why we have more than one, go ahead and choose our at home challenge, and on the left hand side go ahead and choose membership area, where it says members that chose three, that means three people have registered for access, and you click on that, it's going to pull this up, and you can actually delete the account or edit it, so if you edit the contact it takes you to this screen, where you can go to memberships, you can click on the three dots and you can reset the password for them, hopefully you won't have to do that, let's go ahead and head back to our click funnel, but that's just how you get to the reset password, we're going to go back to the at home challenge, click on membership area again, and click on members, and to delete somebody from this, you click on that trash can icon right there, it's going to say are you sure, when you hit okay, they're going to be gone, so hopefully that reset password you'll never have to use, and the delete account you'll probably only want to use when they're no longer a part of the challenge, and they're not a member of your gem, that way they don't still get all that free content without actually participating in anything, now that we've customized the funnel, I want to do a review of it, that way you know what content is in there, once your members go to that registration link, and login with the email address and password that you created for them, we want to know what's in that content so that way you're familiar with it, I'm going to walk you through everything that's in there, under welcome to the challenge, when you click on that, it's going to take you to the welcome to the 42 day detox, this is an overview video that Alex recorded that covers the three main parts of this fitness, nutrition and accountability, the next one is weekly weigh-ins when and how, and this is going to be a video that you'll record covering your weigh-in process, getting them hyped about coming to the weigh-in and really getting involved in it, nutrition is going to cover the meal plans and why we picked the meal plans to really help them eat clean and healthy foods, nutrition overview is a video that Alex recorded, and it covers that process, what's included, understanding your meal plan is very important, it has picking the correct meal plan, this is why they're actually going to see which meal plan they have and see the big pds with all the meal plans and grocery lists, we have in two sections imperial and metric, the big difference is a grocery list, it's going to be a metric for the metric and imperial you know pounds and ounces if you choose imperial, we have three different plans, the 1x, the 1.5x and the 2x and that's a portion size, when you click on one of these it'll open a new tab, it'll take them right here to the pdf of everything that they should have for it, includes all of those recipes and the grocery lists for their proportion, so if it's 1x you'll see 1x if it's 2x it'll be double all of this, going to go and close this and go back to our funnel, scroll back up, under breakfast meals we've actually broken up the recipes by breakfast, lunch and dinner for them, they get a quick video on how to prepare the meal as well as the actual recipe, we list all three variations, the 1, 1.5 and 2 and that's going to be the same for every single recipe that we have here, and at the bottom of every breakfast, lunch dinner section is a grocery list compilation, so all of the grocery lists for breakfast on 1x are here, all of them for 1.5x are here, that way they have a centralized location, now inside of this portal they can click on the green part to collapse that, that way they don't have to keep scrolling up and down, and you'll want to kind of go through this with them, show them how to use it, that way they're comfortable with it already, one less barrier to keep them from staying involved and being ready for this challenge. Underneath the three meals, the breakfast, lunch, dinner, and fitness, this gives you an overview of the fitness section, and fitness explained explains why it's important to them and how often to do it, accountability goes over the accountability, that's also a video that Alex recorded, you don't have to do it, but it talks about how to be really aware of the accountability and the factors that go into it. We broke the weeks down as one through six, and each one has the accountability section, a warm-up, free workouts, and the challenge workout, the challenge workout is something that somebody who's a little more in shape or prepared for this challenge can do to really push themselves, we do have a warm-up in every single week and is the same, week one is going to have accountability weigh in, and this is a link to a scale on Amazon that they can purchase to weigh themselves, week two has accountability weigh your food, and this includes a food scale, so that way they're able to weigh their food as they go and make sure they're getting the right portions, again it does always have the warm-up with every week, as the three workouts has both videos and descriptions of the exercises, and then the challenge workouts, the challenge workouts and warm-ups are the same on each week, on week three we have the accountability workout, this talks about being accountable for your workouts, week four has the first check-in, so this is their midway check-in, later on we're going to show you how to replace the link here with your acuity scheduler link, that way they're able to go ahead and schedule their midweek check or their midway check-in and start that accountability process, under five we have our drink water, so just reviews that more in depth, and that's a video by Alex as well, week six is going to be for their weigh out, and just like the midway this is going to be to schedule their weigh out, and that's also going to be something we cover another video putting in your acuity scheduler link, so they can go ahead and schedule that directly, under supplements you should see your three sections where you've customized your gym name already, and when you click on that it talks about prestige labs, the supplements, why, it's such a great benefit for them to be involved with it, it also has a link to the supplements guide if they want to go through it, and another video we're going to show you how to replace this with your distributor link, that way you get credit for them making purchases through there, the favorites video is going to be a video that you record, that's going to be something talking about what you really like and what you think is the best for them, this is going to be custom for you and your gym, and we'll show you how to change that video out later on, these sections here from the pre-entry, burnam, these actually cover the supplements the prestige labs offers, it has the science behind it and how to take it on every page, that weigh out day, that's something that you'll record for them, and what if I'm not getting results, and that's video is going to cover you know sticking to your accountability, making sure you're
